content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.32%, Bank Nifty -1.04%, PSU Banks -1.82% — broad weakness with selective strength in Energy (+0.83%) and Metals (+0.79%). VIX at 18.10 is elevated. Book is 45% deployed with 7 holdings already; rolling 5-day P&L is negative (profit factor 0.4x) — discipline matters more than new entries. Priority is locking in unrealized gains via tighter SLs.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already at +6.2% with SL at 1035 (above entry 984). Current SL is well above breakeven and locks in ~5% profit. CMP 1046, target 1095. Strong Q4 results, GNPA<1%, MOFSL Buy. SL already optimally placed — moving it tighter risks getting stopped on intraday noise around VWAP 1049. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.6%, SL 119 still ~3.3% below CMP. Gold thesis intact (geopolitical hedge, JPM $5000/oz target). SL has room. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at fresh 52-week high 1437.90, +1.6% in hand. Current SL 1420 is just slightly above entry 1412.94. Tighten SL to 1425 (just above breakeven, below today's intraday support 1430). Stellar Q4 (rev +23%, PAT +27%), volume-led growth. Target unchanged at 1465. Locks in modest gain while leaving room for further upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 407.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week high (414.40), entry 404.50, CMP 409.85. Current SL 406 is ~0.4% above entry. Tighten SL to 407 to lock in small gain while giving the position room — supertrend BUY, MACD bullish, peak demand record 256GW. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Organon deal catalyst driving 5.3x volume. CMP 1752, entry 1734. Current SL 1742 just above entry. Tighten to 1745 (below VWAP 1743) to lock in breakeven+. Today's intraday low 1714 was a shakeout that recovered. Target unchanged at 1830."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.4%, SL 315 well-placed below day low 317.65 and Bollinger mid. Defensive transmission monopoly thesis intact. No need to adjust."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.6%, SL 458 still ~1.8% below CMP 466.55. Q4 PAT +11% beat consensus, but stock faded from intraday high 473.90 to 466.55 — distribution sign. Keep SL tight at 458, no modify needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NMDC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Already at 52-week high (91.20 high, CMP 90.97), price right at upper Bollinger 92.58. Bullish but extended. Adding here means chasing — no clear pullback entry. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INTELLECT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+4.28% intraday move but IT sector down -25% YTD; one-day strength in a beaten-down sector is not a swing entry. Wait for sector confirmation."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already locks in ~5% gain above entry 984. Tightening further risks getting stopped on intraday consolidation. Let it run toward target 1095."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Underwater -1.6%, SL 119 has 3% room. Gold thesis intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "At fresh 52w high; trail SL from 1420 to 1425 to lock breakeven+, just below today's tight intraday range support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 407.00,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high; trail SL from 406 to 407 to ensure no loss while keeping room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "reasoning": "Organon catalyst, 5x volume. Trail SL from 1742 to 1745 to lock breakeven+. Today's low 1714 was shakeout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slightly negative; SL 315 well-placed, no change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Faded from high; SL 458 has adequate room. Hold and watch for follow-through tomorrow."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "NMDC, INTELLECT, COALINDIA add — pass on chasing at extended levels. Power cluster (NTPC, POWERGRID, plus pending TATAPOWER limit) already represents meaningful theme exposure; no further power adds. Pending TATAPOWER@443 limit is below today's range — likely won't fill, will reassess next cycle. Pending HINDZINC@612 and PHARMABEES@23.65 limits — leave to fill or expire.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 names with three pending limit orders that, if filled, would push deployment higher. Rolling 5-day profit factor 0.4x signals execution quality is the issue, not idea generation — so the right move today is risk reduction on winners, not new entries. After SL tightening on NESTLEIND/NTPC/SUNPHARMA, three positions become essentially risk-free (SL at/above entry), which is the goal. Energy/Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + GOLDBEES + COALINDIA + pending TATAPOWER) is approaching cluster concentration — no further adds in this theme."
}
